results.rendered_html: vaḍabā˚gni m. (˚bāgni or ˚vāgni) ‘mare's fire’, submarine fire or the fire of the lower regions (fabled to emerge from a cavity called the ‘mare's mouth’ under the sea at the South pole; cf. aurva),  MBh. ;  Kathās.
